ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_square_miles" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the county's transportation department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the accident occurred */,
  "accident_date" TEXT /* Date the accident occurred */,
  "accident_time" TEXT /* Time the accident occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the accident */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in the accident */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries in the accident */,
  "accident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident type */,
  "road_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the road condition */,
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the accident */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Status of the accident investigation */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the accident data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the accident data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_weather_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_road_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_condition_id") REFERENCES road_conditions ("road_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_accident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_type_id") REFERENCES accident_types ("accident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatalities" (
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatality */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident that resulted in the fatality */,
  "victim_name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "victim_age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "victim_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "victim_residence" TEXT /* Residence of the victim */,
  "victim_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the victim */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fatalities_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident that resulted in the injury */,
  "victim_name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "victim_age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "victim_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "victim_residence" TEXT /* Residence of the victim */,
  "victim_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the victim */,
  "treatment_facility" TEXT /* Treatment facility */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Recovery status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_types" (
  "accident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident type */,
  "accident_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the accident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accident type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level associated with the accident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_severity" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the accident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_severity_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_conditions" (
  "road_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road condition */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident */,
  "road_condition" TEXT /* Road condition at the time of the accident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the road condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_conditions_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition at the time of the accident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the user accessed the system */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_reports_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ranking is for */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the county */,
  "ranking_description" TEXT /* Description of the ranking */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_rankings_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatalities_by_year" (
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatality */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the fatalities are for */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fatality data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fatalities_by_year_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries_by_year" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the injuries are for */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_by_year_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trend is for */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend in accidents */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_trends_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
